name: Docs Suite Sync

on:
push:
paths:
- 'docs/.docx'
- 'docs/.md'
workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
convert-docs:
runs-on: ubuntu-latest
steps:
- name: Checkout repo
uses: actions/checkout@v3

- name: Install pandoc
run: sudo apt-get install -y pandoc

- name: Convert DOCX to Markdown
run: |
for file in docs/*.docx; do
base=file" .docx)
pandoc "{base}.md"
done

- name: Commit converted files
run: |
git config --global user.name "github-actions"
git config --global user.email "actions@github.com"
git add docs/*.md
git commit -m "Auto-convert DOCX to Markdown"
git push
